programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the secretive world of Midsomer's Magic Circle when a magician's assistant drops dead during a show after being poisoned.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. A Brighton football stadium receives a terrifying demand that locks Grace into a frantic race to save countless lives and prevent a chilling death.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Part One: First in a two-parter ending the popular series. There are deadly consequences when Frost joins forces with RSPCA inspector Christine Moorhead on a case.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. The company celebrates its centenary.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway are called in when a top quiz competitor is found floating dead in the fountain of an Oxford college on a bank holiday weekend.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the murder of a university friend of Hobson - as more deaths occur, they realise that Laura's past may hold the key.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A reunion at Oxford's last all-female college ends in tragedy when one of the alumnae is killed - is it connected to an attack there ten years before.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Martin fears that Louisa is in danger when he links a woman's collapse at Portwenn's Harbour Day celebrations to a taxi driver's migraines.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Martin struggles to come to terms with fatherhood, has doubts about Portwenn's new GP, and receives a devastating personal blow.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about two amateur sleuths. Laura and Rosemary are doing restoration work at a health spa when the owner is found strangled.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a couple of amateur sleuths. Rosemary and Laura are not convinced by police theories when two bodies are found at a language school.

programme.title: McDonald and Dodds
programme.desc: McDonald and Dodds are sucked into the fast and furious world of Formula One after a promising young driver dies in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller. When Gwenda Halliday moves into the home of her dreams, she begins to see ghostly apparitions that lead Miss Marple to an unsolved murder.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates an explosion at a haulage yard. When a body turns up, there are plenty of suspects, including a grieving mother and a group of TA soldiers.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Murder mystery drama. Barnaby investigates when a priest is burned to death inside the effigy of a straw woman and more people burst into flames spontaneously.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: Alison discovers Liam's betrayal and races to stop the gang's heist - chaos erupts as lives are endangered and Alison is forced to confront the fallout.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: Alison is reeling from Liam's betrayal and consumed with guilt over her role in the heist when her life is suddenly threatened by one of the gang.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan gets a job up north and decides to get himself sacked in order to earn an extra week's wages.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Never the Twain
programme.desc: Classic British sitcom. Simon decides that a celebration is in order when he and Oliver reach their tenth anniversary as neighbours.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. The inspector puts a new recruit on Jack's bus for training knowing that she will drive him mad with her nagging.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Gennie mans the phones at the vets but her good intentions with an injured animal lead to her being arrested for theft. Sam comforts Jo when a sheep she has injured dies.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa worries about Sam's feelings for Jo and tries to warn him off. Lexi asks Jimmy to help her get back with Carl, and David searches Rodney's house for his manuscript.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Norris decides to install CCTV after the break-in, and Jerry pays the price for his heroics as he gives chase to Kenzie and his gang when they pay a return visit to Roy.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When Lewis investigates the poisoning of a visiting female bishop, two more deaths mirroring macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy convolute proceedings.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick is confronted by a Russian sailor demanding political asylum, and Greengrass teams up with an unusual partner.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. The discovery of wartime ammunition leads to problems when it falls into the hands of some local children.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the body of a young man is found in a Second World War-era motor car full of exhaust fumes, it looks like suicide, but all is not as it seems..

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Carl suggests Anna take one of the trucks out, but she runs out petrol. Matthew pulls up in his car and relishes finding out who Anna is.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jerry's ex-wife Teresa turns up to help the Morton family, and a mortified Chesney gets a pep talk from Kirk. Meanwhile, Sean overhears Becky enthusing about her night of passion.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jerry is less than impressed to have Teresa at his bedside. Steve and Dan play dirty as they try to outdo each other and Chesney lands the lead role in the school play.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. There are plenty of people to give advice when Nick and Kate's marriage is thrown into turmoil.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick investigates a malicious burglary and Greengrass is discovered handling stolen goods.
